column1: # 排除已知无害的规则，保留关键安全检测
10019  IGNORE  (Content-Type header missing — handled by Nginx config)
10037  WARN    (Server leaks version info via HTTP header)
10038  IGNORE  (Content Security Policy not set — configured in Nginx)
10202  WARN    (Absence of Anti-CSRF tokens — SPA不需要)
90033  WARN    (NoScript XSS Injection — for legacy browser)
